title: Noetfield Cloud Factory — Wiring & Commissioning Contract v1
authority: Founder order 2026-07-23: full plan, locked and machine-enforceable, for ONLY wiring and commissioning existing pieces, toward real delivery to users, all in sandbox, under the commissioning motor.
evidence_basis: 20-agent read-only inventory + downgrade-biased adversarial verify (workflow wf_a66ceb51-1b8, 2026-07-23), 10 pieces, 0 agent errors. Companion doc: product/WIRING_COMMISSIONING_PLAN_v1.md.

enforcement.rule_1: A job is DONE only when the verify script computes its exit_gate as passing from artifacts on disk. Hand-assertions, doc claims, and agent reports NEVER count.
enforcement.rule_2: The verify script checks this contract's sha256 against receipts/WIRING_COMMISSIONING_PLAN_LOCK_v1.json before evaluating; mismatch = ENFORCEMENT_VIOLATION, exit 3, no statuses reported.
enforcement.rule_3: founder_gate.receipt_glob receipts are append-only artifacts created only by the founder or on the founder's explicit order; a job whose founder_gate.required is true and whose founder receipt is absent can NEVER compute DONE (even with a fabricated exit receipt) — it reports AWAITING_FOUNDER. DONE requires exit_gate AND founder receipt AND all deps DONE.
enforcement.rule_4: All statuses are computed, never stored. This contract contains no status fields by design.
enforcement.rule_5: The lock receipt (receipts/WIRING_COMMISSIONING_PLAN_LOCK_v1.json) is fail-closed: its ABSENCE, not only a mismatch, is an ENFORCEMENT_VIOLATION. Deleting the lock cannot re-open a fail-open hole.
enforcement.rule_6: Receipts are forgeable file artifacts; the defence is (a) high-value gates require externally-checkable IDs (GHA run_url, 40-hex commit_sha, PR number, verifier countersignature) via the 'matches' predicate, and (b) ALL receipts are append-only and re-audited by the W4 trust layer, so fabrication is detectable post-hoc. A green status from this script is a claim to be audited, not a final truth — W4 is the auditor.

allowed_job_classes: sync — fast-forward/reconcile an existing checkout to its own origin main; preserve-first for any dirty file
land — PR-merge an existing, already-pushed branch; no new feature commits beyond rebase conflicts
receipt — produce/commit a receipt for work already done, or re-run an existing check to refresh its receipt
adapter — thin glue bounded by two existing contracts (POST/poll/translate); no new business logic
config — secrets/env/DNS/schedule plumbing for artifacts that already exist; deploy of already-built artifacts through existing fences
verify — deterministic checks, canaries, crons on existing patterns
cleanup — remove verified-duplicate residue, prune merged worktrees, fix labels/pins
forbidden: New features, new products, new UIs, new scenarios, new categories (CAT-07 hard hold stands). A strictly read-only display or API of already-emitted state is glue, not a new UI — nothing that authors, edits, or originates state.
Overriding, weakening, or working around ANY existing founder gate, fence, HOLD, or not_now_boundary

Raising the motor router ceiling or enabling any auto-dispatch worker above W-INTEL-LOW (class_rank 1). The ceiling is STRUCTURAL (ADAPTER_REGISTRY_v2 has no rank-2 row; router MAX_AUTOMATIC_RANK=1); only the founder may lift it. No job here adds a rank-2 or W-HANDOFF adapter.
Extending the HDIR internal-service contract or its scenario enum (locked to 'webpage-build-deploy'); reuse runway.v1 as-is
Marking any job done without its named receipt existing on disk
Direct patch work on canonical mains — all patch-class execution flows through motor/sandbox lanes (sandbox-first law)
New directories at the org root; new worktrees outside session scratchpad
Deleting or gitignoring receipts (append-only law); deleting any unpushed/ahead work before it is preserved (preserve-first law)
explicit_exclusions: Runway founder-authority 'RECORDED, NOT ENFORCED' → ENFORCED (routing approval_required gates through resolveFounderAuthority) — this is design/feature work, out of wiring-v1 scope; tracked as a future founder gate, not a job here.

SG production commissioning (flipping runtime_reality sg.runtime_status→COMMISSIONED) is deliberately OUT OF SCOPE — every W6 cold-proof step runs sandbox/staging-only where the gate ALLOWS; the fail-closed exit-78 behaviour on production paths is correct and preserved.

The 5 of 8 GHA factory categories that executed but are NOT green (cat-01 2/3, cat-03 partial, etc.) are a separate greening effort, not commissioned by this plan; W2-08 only adds cat-08's first receipt.
HDIR non-durable idempotency (in-memory Map) is tolerated at staging scope for W2-06; durable idempotency is a backlog item, not wired here.

pureflow canonical remote/main establishment is a standing P0 FOUNDER gate that blocks all SITE-pureflow-source lanes; no pureflow lane is in v1 scope — surfaced in the founder queue, resolution deferred.
Studio IDE notarized-app distribution (DMG + Apple Developer ID) is a separate founder Apple-ID gate; W5-09 reaches .app+.vsix grade only.
doctrine.precedence: Where this contract and an existing founder gate disagree, the founder gate wins. Where this contract and the product registry disagree, the registry wins.

roots.note: All paths below are relative to roots.org unless absolute.

jobs.title: FULL-LINE COLD PROOF: one founder heading → P0-PGR packet → motor DAG → SourceA sandbox executor + HDIR runway job → SG gate preflight on every deploy-class step → independent verifier PASS → receipts visible to the unified auditor + drift-guard — cold start, zero manual steps inside unlocked windows
constraints: Sandbox/staging steps ONLY — where a real deploy-class step invokes promotion_gate.py under runtime_reality NOT_COMMISSIONED it correctly hard-stops (exit 78); the cold proof exercises the ALLOWED paths and records the gate preflight, it does NOT flip SG production commissioning (out of scope).
Motor auto-dispatch stays at/below router class_rank 1 (W-INTEL-LOW); the line does not raise the ceiling to complete.

founder_gate.note: The heading is the founder's only touch.

jobs.title: STEADY STATE 7D: seven consecutive days of green scheduled receipts across every unlocked cron (drift-guard, plan-intake, TrustField loops, autorunner, deadmen) with zero founder interrupts outside the decision queue
